pi_items.source: seed_demodb.py creates database named 'demodb' (line 51), setup_task.sh references demodb throughout, export_result.sh uses DB_NAME='demodb'

Task description explicitly requires Year and Month vertex classes (task.json lines 7-8). setup_task.sh drops these classes (lines 19-20). export_result.sh queries Year class (line 63) and Month class (line 70). verifier.py checks for both classes (lines 47-48).

Task description explicitly requires HasMonth and BornIn edge classes (task.json lines 9-10). setup_task.sh drops these classes (lines 17-18). export_result.sh queries HasMonth edges (line 70) and BornIn edges (line 76). verifier.py checks for both classes (lines 47-48).

seed_demodb.py creates Profiles vertex class (line 67) and seeds it with 17 profiles (lines 192-221). setup_task.sh verifies Profiles exist (line 24). export_result.sh queries from Profiles (line 76). verifier.py checks Profiles counts (lines 101-102).

privileged_info_summary: The demographic_time_tree task operates on a synthetic travel agency database called 'demodb' containing 17 synthetic user profiles with realistic names and birth dates ranging from 1970 to 1996. The task requires creating Year and Month vertex classes and HasMonth (Year->Month) and BornIn (Profile->Month) edge classes to build a temporal graph index linking user profiles to their birth months and years. The profile class is 'Profiles' and all data is synthetically generated by seed_demodb.py during environment setup.
